headline: Here Are Tuesday’s Best Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Centene, Darden Restaurants, Flutter Entertainment, GE Healthcare, IBM, Nike, SpaceX, Synopsys, Target, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading lower after a mixed start to trading on Monday, following the holiday-shortened week due to the Juneteenth Federal holiday. We may start to see some end-of-the-quarter reallocations and selling for Hedge funds, ETFs, and Mutual Funds this week, and today looks like a starting point. With most corporate buybacks ... headline: Wells Fargo Downgrades Ross Stores to Equal-Weight, Maintains Price Target to $245
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Ike Boruchow   downgrades Ross Stores (NASDAQ:ROST) from Overweight to Equal-Weight and maintains the price target from $245 to $245.

raw.headline: Wells Fargo Downgrades Ross Stores to Equal-Weight, Maintains Price Target to $245

headline: Matthew McClintock: Prime Day is approaching what we see with Black Friday
summary: Matthew McClintock, Founder of M Squared Capital, expects a strong Prime Day as inflation pressures drive consumers toward deals. He favors Walmart operationally but sees Target as the more attractive stock.
